message:
fix(messaging): preserve pull request expiry across re-enqueue + audit batch 401

Bug fix in consumer.rs: dispatch_next_pull() was resetting
enqueued_at_tick when re-enqueuing pull requests with no data
available, effectively extending the TTL indefinitely. Now preserves
the original enqueue time so expiry is measured from first submission.

Audit batch 401 — 7 messaging files (~12,133L), 1 MEDIUM bug fixed:
- compiler.rs (1238L) SOUND
- fabric.rs (2584L) SOUND
- consumer.rs (3688L) FIXED (pull request expiry reset)
- morphism.rs (2126L) SOUND
- service.rs (2068L) SOUND
- privacy.rs (420L) SOUND
- snapshot.rs (9L) SOUND (stub)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
